name: Indoor Golf
about: Keep Active Indoor Golf is a facility offering 24/7 access to members via fobs, with initial setup during staffed hours. It features two Full Swing Golf Simulators that support up to 8 golfers per bay, utilizing industry-leading technology for real-time feedback and practice customization. The venue operates on a membership-only model with tiered plans providing weekly bay time, and allows members to bring their own food, drinks, and clubs for a self-sufficient experience.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access for members via fobs allows for flexible practice sessions
Full Swing technology provides real-time feedback and customization for practice
Support for up to 8 golfers per bay makes it great for groups and friends
Option to bring your own food and drink creates a relaxed, comfortable environment

food_and_drink.notes: Members may bring their own food
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB not specified

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue does not provide clubs; you must bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, you may bring your own food and drink.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes is not specified; depends on simulator software and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue allows families and supports large groups, making it suitable for kids.
